title: Operator autocycle execute-safe improvement status sync from execution v0
problem: Ticket-350 refreshes autonomous_loop_improvement_status in operator loop execute-safe output, but operator autocycle execute-safe stores execution without updating evaluation.autonomous_loop_improvement_status from the refreshed payload.
acceptance_criteria: After autocycle execute-safe pass, evaluation and summary autonomous_loop_improvement_status match execution payload when present.
Failed autocycle execute-safe leaves pre-run improvement status unchanged.
No execute-safe command allowlist changes or queue writes.
rollback_plan: Revert autocycle improvement execution sync only.
